_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Implement data management standards, requirements, and specifications.
reference_document_element_description: Define enterprise data integration standards, including interface contracts, schema evolution policies, API versioning standards, and event schema governance.
comments: DCWF task equal WIDAI DA domain. DA-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-T-001 (DA, cosine: 0.675), DQ-T-015 (DQ, cosine: 0.662).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.6/10 (raw 0.661). Shared vocabulary: [data, standards]. DCWF-only terms [implement, management, requirements, specifications] vs WIDAI-only terms [api, contracts, define, enterprise, event, evolution] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.910 (P=0.934, R=0.888). P exceeds R by 0.046 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Implement data management standards, requirements, and specifications." and "Define enterprise data integration standards, including interface contracts, sch" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.723 > STS 0.661 (gap +0.062). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data, standards] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.0%. Shared tokens: [data, standards]. DCWF-only: [implement, management, requirements, specifications]. WIDAI-only: [api, contracts, define, enterprise, event, evolution].
